title: Add init and sequential thinking skills
goal: Update the embedded skills harness with init bootstrap and sequential thinking support.
completionConditions: Built-in skills include init-bootstrap and sequential-thinking with valid SKILL.md frontmatter/content.
Skill router selects init-bootstrap for init/bootstrap goals and sequential-thinking for complex planning/analysis goals without affecting --skills off.
Project init generated SKILLS_PLAN/MCP_PLAN mention both surfaces and docs/release/status stay in sync.
Focused Rust tests and JSON smoke checks pass.
verificationCommands: cargo run -q -p jcode --bin jcode-harness -- skills list --json | python3 -m json.tool >/dev/null
cargo run -q -p jcode --bin jcode-harness -- skills match "use /init and sequential thinking for project analysis" --json | python3 -m json.tool >/dev/null
notes: User requested in Portuguese: atualizar com o init e pensamento sequencial.
